testcase.name: OpenSparrow – RAG: Page Structure loads RAG page
OpenSparrow – RAG: Page Structure has conversation container
OpenSparrow – RAG: Page Structure has query textarea
OpenSparrow – RAG: Page Structure has Send button
OpenSparrow – RAG: Page Structure has Clear history button
OpenSparrow – RAG: Page Structure has tag filter sidebar
OpenSparrow – RAG: Page Structure sidebar has a title
OpenSparrow – RAG: Page Structure textarea is writable
OpenSparrow – RAG: Tag Loading file list transitions from loading state
testcase.classname: file list transitions from loading state

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – RAG: Tag Loading file list shows documents or empty state
testcase.classname: file list shows documents or empty state

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – RAG: Send Interaction Send button click with empty textarea does not post
testcase.classname: Send button click with empty textarea does not post

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – RAG: Send Interaction typing question enables send interaction
OpenSparrow – RAG: Send Interaction clicking Send with query but no file selected shows error in conversation
testcase.classname: clicking Send with query but no file selected shows error in conversation

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – RAG: Send Interaction Send fires POST to api/rag.php when a document is checked
testcase.classname: Send fires POST to api/rag.php when a document is checked

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – RAG: Send Interaction after send: user message appears in conversation
testcase.classname: after send: user message appears in conversation

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – RAG: Send Interaction Clear history button empties conversation
OpenSparrow – RAG: Mobile loads on mobile viewport
OpenSparrow – RAG: Mobile textarea and send button exist on mobile
testcase.classname: textarea and send button exist on mobile
